services.title: Home Dog Boarding
services.description: A home from home for your beloved dog on the outskirts of Congleton, bordering the Cheshire countryside. They'll be welcomed and cared for in our family home with an enclosed garden and beautiful walks personalised to their needs.

additionalPricing.heading: Additional dogs from the same household

services.note: Additional charges apply for puppies under 12 months.

services.title: Day Care
services.description: Whether you have a long day in the office or some exciting social plans, rest assured your furry family member will be welcomed into our home for a day filled with enrichment, stimulation and countryside walks.
services.note: Additional charges apply for puppies under 12 months.

otherServices.description: Katie's K9s also offers an array of other services including wedding chaperone, pet taxi and vet transportation. Whatever your requirements, please don't hesitate to get in touch for more details and a quote.
